scripts.help: node ./scripts/help.mjs # 查看根仓库脚本说明
scripts.build: bash ./scripts/build.sh all # 完整构建整个仓库
scripts.build:all: bash ./scripts/build.sh all # 全量构建并刷新全局 CLI
scripts.build:downcity: bash ./scripts/build.sh downcity # 只构建 console-ui 和 packages/downcity
scripts.build:homepage: pnpm -C homepage build # 只构建官网
scripts.build:extension: bash ./scripts/extbuild.sh # 只构建 Chrome 扩展
scripts.install:ws: pnpm install # 安装整个 workspace 依赖
scripts.dev:consoleui: pnpm -C console-ui dev # 启动 console-ui 开发服务
scripts.dev:ui-sdk: pnpm -C packages/downcity-ui dev # 启动 UI SDK watch 构建
scripts.dev:homepage: pnpm -C homepage dev # 启动 homepage 开发服务
scripts.homepage: pnpm -C homepage dev # homepage 的短命令别名
scripts.ui: npm --prefix ./console-ui run dev # console-ui 的短命令别名
scripts.publish:ui: ./scripts/publish-ui.sh # 执行 UI 包发布流程
